store.name: StyleVault
store.tagline: Premium Fashion & Lifestyle — Delivered to You
store.order_instructions: Send us a message with the *product name*, your *size* (if applicable), and your *delivery address* and we will get back to you with payment details.

products.name: Classic Structured Tote
products.description: Handcrafted from full-grain genuine leather. Spacious interior with magnetic snap closure, two slip pockets, and a zip pocket. Comes with a removable shoulder strap.

products.name: Mini Crossbody Leather Bag
products.description: Compact and stylish top-handle bag crafted from soft pebbled leather. Features an adjustable strap and gold-tone hardware. Perfect for evenings and everyday carry.

products.name: Classic Oxford Leather Shoes
products.description: Timeless cap-toe oxfords in smooth calfskin leather. Goodyear-welted construction for lasting durability. Available in black and tan. Dress smart, every day.

products.name: Chelsea Ankle Boot
products.description: Sleek pull-on Chelsea boot in supple leather with elasticated side panels. Block heel for extra comfort. Pairs effortlessly with jeans, chinos, or a suit.

products.name: Premium White Low-Top Sneakers
products.description: Clean, minimalist low-top sneakers with a cushioned insole and rubber outsole. Crafted from genuine leather upper. The perfect go-to sneaker for any outfit.

products.name: Retro High-Top Sneakers
products.description: Bold high-top silhouette with chunky sole and padded ankle collar. Premium canvas upper with leather accents. Available in multiple colourways.

products.name: Premium Heavyweight T-Shirt
products.description: 240 GSM 100% ring-spun cotton tee with a relaxed boxy fit. Pre-shrunk for a consistent fit wash after wash. Available in 10 colours including black, white, and earth tones.

products.name: Linen Button-Up Shirt
products.description: Breathable 100% linen shirt with a relaxed, slightly oversized fit. Features a spread collar, chest pocket, and mother-of-pearl buttons. Ideal for tropical weather.

products.name: Relaxed Straight-Leg Jeans
products.description: Roomy, relaxed straight-leg jeans in heavyweight 12 oz denim. Slightly dropped crotch and wide thigh for maximum comfort. Classic five-pocket styling. Unisex fit.

products.name: Wide-Leg Cargo Jeans
products.description: Ultra-wide leg cargo jeans with six functional pockets. Mid-rise waist with adjustable belt loops. Made from durable denim with a slight stretch for comfort.

products.name: Classic Stainless Steel Watch
products.description: Elegant 40 mm stainless steel case with a sapphire crystal glass and automatic movement. Water-resistant to 50 m. Comes with a stainless steel bracelet and a spare leather strap.

products.name: Minimalist Leather Strap Watch
products.description: Ultra-thin 38 mm case with a clean sunburst dial and genuine leather strap. Japanese quartz movement. A timeless everyday watch that dresses up or down.

products.name: Classic Aviator Sunglasses
products.description: Iconic teardrop-shaped aviator frames in polished gold-tone metal. Polarised gradient lenses with UV400 protection. Comes with a hard case and microfibre cleaning cloth.

products.name: Square Frame Optical Glasses
products.description: Bold square acetate frames available in tortoise, black, and crystal. Lightweight yet sturdy construction. Suitable for prescription lenses (glazing available on request).

products.name: Shea Butter Glow Body Cream
products.description: Rich, fast-absorbing body cream packed with raw shea butter, cocoa butter, and vitamin E. Deeply moisturises, evens skin tone, and leaves a natural glow. Fragrance-free.

products.name: Vitamin C Brightening Body Lotion
products.description: Lightweight daily lotion infused with stable Vitamin C, niacinamide, and hyaluronic acid. Brightens dull skin, fades dark spots, and provides all-day hydration.

products.name: Intense Moisture Hair Cream
products.description: Leave-in moisturising cream enriched with argan oil, shea butter, and keratin. Softens, detangles, and defines curls without weighing hair down. Suitable for all hair types.

products.name: Edge Control & Styling Cream
products.description: Firm-hold styling cream for sleek edges and frizz control. Enriched with castor oil and aloe vera for moisture. Long-lasting hold that does not flake or leave residue.
